title: Trips and Payments Analysis for Premium Users
prompt: For each premium user, calculate the total trip distance traveled and the total amount paid across all their trips in July 2025. Output should include `user_id`, `total_distance_km`, and `total_paid_usd`. Order the results by `total_paid_usd` descending.
reference_sql: SELECT u.user_id, SUM(t.distance_km) AS total_distance_km, SUM(p.amount_usd) AS total_paid_usd FROM users u JOIN trips t ON u.user_id = t.user_id JOIN payments p ON t.trip_id = p.trip_id WHERE u.plan = 'premium' AND t.request_ts >= '2025-07-01' AND t.request_ts < '2025-08-01' GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY total_paid_usd DESC;
hint_notes: Key idea is to join users, trips, and payments tables correctly; common mistake is forgetting to filter for July 2025 or not grouping by user properly.
